name: Fruity Buckwheat Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Peeled, cored, finely chopped Granny Smith Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, finely chopped Granny Smith apples, buckwheat flour, sugar, dates, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl.
2. Make a well in the center of the mixture.
3. In another bowl, combine buttermilk, oil, and egg. Stir until just combined.
4. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until moistened.
5. Divide the batter evenly among muffin cups coated with cooking spray.
6. Bake at 375°F for 20 minutes.
7. Remove from the pan immediately and let cool on wire racks.
8. Makes 12 muffins.
Origin: Journal American, January 13 1993
Shared by: Sharon Stevens
